creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 236818
v0

"poudriere bulk -Ctj 131amd64 www/deno" succeeded after removing RUSTC_BOOTSTRAP. Is it still necessary for something?

Note, RUSTC_BOOTSTRAP=1 can be limited in effect via RUSTC_BOOTSTRAP=<crate>,<crate>,... per https://github.com/rust-lang/rust/pull/77802.
